title: <p><strong>Assessment Details:</strong></p>
content:
<p><strong>Assessment Details:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>📌 <strong>Handwritten responses only (no devices allowed).</strong></li>
<li>📌 <strong>Technology must be left in the classroom until completion.</strong></li>
<li>📌 <strong>Completion of the assessment = attendance credit (must score a C or higher).</strong></li>
</ul>
<p>📍 <strong>Full details & weekly exam link:</strong> <a href="#">The Analytical Review</a></p>
<hr />
<h3>📌 4. Literary Narrative / Reading Autobiography (Week 6 Shift)</h3>
<p>This assignment replaces Week 6’s discussion and close reading. The purpose of this shift is to move away from traditional analysis toward personal engagement with narrative. Rather than only analyzing other texts, you’ll reflect on how storytelling functions in your life.</p>
<p>📍 <strong>Full details & submission link:</strong> <a href="#">Literary Narrative Essay</a></p>
